chapter_title.ar: باب الْمُسْلِمِ يَقْتُلُ الذِّمِّيَّ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ وَ الذِّمِّيِّ يَقْتُلُ الْمُسْلِمَ أَوْ يَجْرَحُهُ أَوْ يَقْتَصُّ بَعْضُهُمْ بَعْضاً
chapter_title.en: Chapter 25 – The Muslim kills the Zimmy or injures him, and the Zimmy kills the Muslim or injures him, or they retaliate against each other

text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ رَجُلٍ مُسْلِمٍ فَقَأَ عَيْنَ نَصْرَانِيٍّ فَقَالَ إِنَّ دِيَةَ عَيْنِ النَّصْرَانِيِّ أَرْبَعُمِائَةِ دِرْهَمٍ .

en.hubeali: Ibn Mahboub, from Ibn Raib, from Bureyd Al Ajaly who said,
‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about a Muslim man who blinded an eye of a Christian. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘The wergild of an eye of a Christian is four hundred Dirhams’.
